phases.effort_reason: Focused test and artifact work with bounded code movement.
phases.name: contract-regression-net
phases.precondition: - Migration status is `in-progress` and this phase is the manifest `current_phase`. - No earlier migration phase is incomplete. - A contract inventory artifact exists at `phase-1-contract-inventory.md` and lists the concrete behaviors this phase will lock.

phases.effort_reason: Internal deletions across heterogeneous random files need careful contract-preserving reasoning.
phases.name: internal-cleanup-behind-contracts
phases.precondition: - Phase 1 is complete. - `phase-1-contract-inventory.md` exists and Phase 1 regression coverage is present in the repository. - Candidate source edits remain inside the random-targeted migration scope.

phases.effort_reason: Primarily documentation plus gating-state correctness with limited code-path change.
phases.name: interface-shift-review-gate
phases.precondition: - Phase 2 is complete. - At least one concrete interface behavior delta is documented with reproducible before/after behavior. - The migration still has `awaiting_human_review` unset at phase start, so this phase can set and verify the gate.
